title: Error Classification Record
description: Governed record that captures one or more canonical taxonomy-coded error classifications derived from a source system signal, preserving the raw input for audit.

classification_id.description: Unique identifier for this classification record.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this record was created.

artifact_id.description: ID of the artifact this classification relates to.

artifact_type.description: Type of the artifact (e.g. meeting_minutes, working_paper).

pass_id.description: Pass identifier within an evaluation run.

source_system.description: Source system that produced the raw signal.

classifications.description: One or more canonical error code classifications derived from the raw input.

raw_inputs.description: Original source signal preserved verbatim for audit trail.

taxonomy_version.description: Version of the error taxonomy catalog used for classification.

evidence_source.description: Which field or signal from raw_inputs supports this classification.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation for why this code was assigned.
